summary: Iteration 11 - Complete testing of Major Overhaul features: Currency detection (USD auto-detected), Exchange Rates admin tab, Duration tier selectors on homepage, Annual tier Contact for Pricing, 4-step enrollment flow with Promo Code validation, Quote Request form. All 14 backend tests passed. All frontend flows verified working.
critical_code_review_comments: CurrencyContext.js correctly implements auto-detection from /api/currency/detect and shows single currency only
ProgramsSection.jsx has tier selector with data-testid attributes, Annual tier correctly shows Contact for Pricing button
EnrollmentPage.jsx implements 4-step flow: Participants → Review+Promo → Billing+OTP → Pay
Promo code validation POST /api/promotions/validate works with percentage and fixed discounts
ContactPage.jsx correctly pre-fills message when accessed with program/tier URL params
ExchangeRatesTab.jsx displays editable table of 38+ currencies with Save/Reload buttons
Quote request POST /api/enrollment/quote-request saves to DB successfully
seed_data_creation: Using existing programs seeded in iteration 10. Two promo codes exist: EARLY50 (fixed), NY2026 (15% percentage)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All major overhaul features verified. Currency detection returns USD for US server. 4-step enrollment flow works end-to-end. Promo codes EARLY50 and NY2026 are active. Phone OTP is MOCKED (returned in API response). Annual tier shows 'Contact for Pricing' button.

mocked_features.phone_otp: MOCKED - OTP generated server-side, returned in API response field 'mock_otp' for testing

currency_detection.GET /api/currency/detect: PASS - Returns {currency: usd, symbol: USD, country: US, rate: 1.0, is_primary: true}
currency_detection.single_currency_display: PASS - Homepage shows prices in USD only (no AED/INR shown)

exchange_rates.GET /api/currency/exchange-rates: PASS - Returns base=aed with 38 currency rates
exchange_rates.admin_tab: PASS - Exchange Rates tab shows editable table with Currency/Code/Rate columns

homepage_flagship_programs.tier_selectors: PASS - All 6 cards have 1 Month/3 Months/Annual buttons
homepage_flagship_programs.tier_click_no_navigation: PASS - Clicking tier buttons changes price display, does NOT navigate away
homepage_flagship_programs.annual_tier: PASS - Shows 'Contact for Pricing' button instead of price/enroll
homepage_flagship_programs.enroll_button: PASS - 'Enroll Now' button visible for priced tiers

contact_for_pricing.navigation: PASS - Clicking 'Contact for Pricing' navigates to /contact with program params
contact_for_pricing.heading: PASS - Page shows 'Request a Quote' heading
contact_for_pricing.pre_filled_message: PASS - Message field pre-filled with tier/program info

enrollment_4_step_flow.step_indicator: PASS - Shows 4 steps: Participants, Review, Billing, Pay
enrollment_4_step_flow.step_1_participants: PASS - Form with name, relationship, age, gender, country, mode fields
enrollment_4_step_flow.step_2_review_cart: PASS - Shows cart summary with participant list, prices, total
enrollment_4_step_flow.step_2_promo_code: PASS - Promo input field with Apply button
enrollment_4_step_flow.step_3_billing_otp: PASS - Booker name/email/country/phone fields, OTP verification
enrollment_4_step_flow.step_4_pay: PASS - Final summary with Pay button showing total in USD

promo_code_validation.POST /api/promotions/validate: PASS - Returns discount info for valid codes
promo_code_validation.fixed_discount: PASS - EARLY50 returns fixed USD 15 / AED 50 / INR 1000
promo_code_validation.ui_discount_display: PASS - Cart shows 'Saving USD 30' and updated total

quote_request.POST /api/enrollment/quote-request: PASS - Saves quote request to database

program_detail_page.duration_tiers: PASS - Shows 3 tier cards (1 Month, 3 Months, Annual)
program_detail_page.single_currency: PASS - Prices shown in USD only
program_detail_page.annual_contact_us: PASS - Annual tier shows 'Contact Us' button
